info.title: ConvertJsonToGherkinExampleTable.CLI
info.description: To convert a JSON into a Gherking Example table

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: $ convert the JSON into Example Gherking language

options.name: jsonFile
options.description: Indicate the complete path to the JSON file to be converted

options.name: jsonFolder
options.description: Indicate the folder to the JSON files to be converted

options.name: destFolder
options.description: the result folder, if this param won't provide the result will come to Clipboard

options.name: fromclp
options.description: indicate that the payload source should come from the Clipboard

options.name: gencode
options.description: Indicate that the code to use the table will be created

options.name: destgencode
options.description: Indicate the destin folder for the generated code
